name: Subactor Agent Control Loop
summary: Controls todo-agent task execution through bounded loops, cron discovery and deduplicated triggers.
description: A URI-native control plane for Subactor's doctor, repair and validator fleet. It reuses todo-agent discovery and its validated runner, persists generation and retry feedback, and never accepts commands or repository paths from actor payloads.
useCases: Run ready todo-agent task packages from a urirun node
Drive cron-based maintenance without duplicate schedule slots
Queue ticket, repository and webhook triggers with idempotency keys
Inspect generations, run receipts and deterministic retry backoff
